meaning: n.[医]利斯特氏菌病,李氏杆菌病
examples: Diseases recorded to be carried by wolves include rabies, brucella, deerfly fever, listeriosis, foot and mouth disease and anthrax.
METHODS To carry out a field epidemiological survey and etiological study on Listeriosis.
Septicemic listeriosis probably develops from ingestion or possibly inhalation of the bacteria.
Listeriosis is preceded by flu-like symptoms including a fever, according to the FDA website.
